hero.name: Vipin Vijayan Nair
hero.subtitle: Staff Design Engineer @ Visa — 16 years shipping production apps at scale. Focused on AI applications, Mobile applications, Web deployments, and Tap to Pay.

highlights: Built production-grade RAG systems with LangGraph, ChromaDB, and OpenAI
Deployed 8+ working AI prototypes to HuggingFace Spaces
Completed 14 specialized AI modules across RAG, LLMs, MCP, and Agentic AI

paragraphs: Staff Design Engineer @ Visa — Building AI-powered systems and shipping mobile/web apps used by millions. Currently: AI apps, web deployments, Tap to Pay.
about.location: Austin, Texas, Quincy, MA (US), Technopark Trivandrum (India)
about.focus: AI, Mobile Engineering, Kubernetes, Cloud, RAG, LLMs, Agentic AI

highlights.title: Mobile Expert
highlights.text: Native iOS/Android + React Native/Flutter, shipping apps to millions of users.

highlights.title: AI Enthusiast
highlights.text: Building with LLMs, RAG pipelines, and agentic workflows for real-world products.

highlights.title: System Designer
highlights.text: Scalable architectures, performance optimization, and production-grade solutions.

highlights.title: UI/UX Focused
highlights.text: Intuitive interfaces for complex products with accessibility and performance in mind.

ai.subheaderText: Building intelligent systems with modern AI tools and frameworks.

mobile.subheaderText: Platforms, languages, tooling, and integrations used to ship mobile products.

items: Leading mobile UI/UX engineering for Visa's payment applications serving millions of users worldwide
Architected and delivered cross-platform mobile solutions using React Native and native iOS/Android
Established mobile design system and component library adopted across multiple product teams
Driving AI integration into mobile products, building intelligent features with LLM-powered workflows
Led a team of 6 mobile engineers building the Fidelity mobile trading platform
Implemented real-time portfolio tracking and trading features with sub-second latency
Drove adoption of automated testing, achieving 90%+ code coverage across mobile apps
Built iOS SDK components for mobile analytics and marketing automation
Developed demo applications showcasing platform capabilities

aiProjects.name: AI-Powered School Events Assistant
aiProjects.description: Production-grade RAG system for school event management with intelligent chat interface, real-time data sync, and admin dashboard.
features: Multi-document RAG pipeline with intelligent document routing
Real-time event sync with Google Sheets integration
Admin dashboard for event management and analytics

aiProjects.name: Forge – AI Workflow Orchestrator
aiProjects.description: Visual tool for building complex AI workflows with real-time monitoring, multi-agent orchestration, and production-grade error handling.
features: Visual node-based workflow builder for AI pipelines
Real-time execution monitoring with cost tracking
Multi-agent orchestration with custom tool integration

aiProjects.name: VSPP Portal (Project Hawk)
aiProjects.description: Enterprise-grade AI assistant for Visa's Strategic Product Planning with RAG-powered document analysis and intelligent recommendations.
features: Multi-document RAG with intelligent chunking and retrieval

aiProjects.name: Eagle Eye – Visual Data Extractor
aiProjects.description: Multi-modal AI agent that extracts structured data from PDFs and images using Claude vision capabilities with MCP protocol integration.
features: PDF and image processing with OCR capabilities
Structured data extraction using Claude vision
MCP protocol integration for tool orchestration

aiProjects.name: Vibe-Coded LLM Chat App
aiProjects.description: Full-featured chat application built with Streamlit, supporting multiple LLM providers with streaming responses and conversation history.
features: Streaming response display with real-time updates

aiProjects.name: MDL Verifier – Mobile Driving License
aiProjects.description: AI-powered document verification system for mobile driving licenses using computer vision and OCR for real-time identity validation.
features: OCR extraction of driving license details

personalProjects.name: Flutter Themer
personalProjects.description: A website which helps you theme your entire Flutter app and shows a live preview. Simply copy the theme file and apply it in your Flutter project to style your entire app in a professional way.
features: Live preview of Flutter themes in real-time
One-click theme file generation for easy integration
Customizable color palettes, typography, and spacing
Professional-grade themes ready for production apps

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.description: I'm always interested in discussing AI engineering, mobile development, or potential collaborations. Whether you're architecting a greenfield app, or scaling an existing product — let's talk.
